name: Scalloped Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Lightly spray a 2-quart casserole dish with vegetable spray.
3. Arrange a layer of potatoes in the casserole, then sprinkle with some onion, flour, salt, and pepper.
4. Continue layering until all potatoes, onion, flour, salt, and pepper are used.
5. Dot the top with margarine, then pour milk over everything.
6. Bake for 20 minutes at 400°F.
7. Reduce heat to 350°F and bake for an additional 50 to 60 minutes, or until tender.
